basic_details.job_title: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika. The recruitment has been announced through the Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Recruitment 2026.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 6600 + Rs.3300/- + DA as per rule + 525 (book expenses) + Rs.27000/- Stipend as per rule
salary_details.details: Rs. 6600 + Rs.3300/- + DA as per rule + 525 (book expenses) + Rs.27000/- Stipend as per rule

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Junior House Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. House Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Jr. House Officer post is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Jr. House Officer position?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Jr. House Officer position is an M.B.B.S. degree. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Jr. House Officer post is 38 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules, which can be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the Jr. House Officer post is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Jr. House Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Jr. House Officer post includes Rs. 6600 + Rs.3300/- + DA as per rule + 525 (book expenses) + Rs.27000/- Stipend as per rule. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Jr. House Officer post?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there are 0 vacancies announced for the Jr. House Officer post in this recruitment drive. Candidates should refer to the official notification for the most accurate vacancy details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Jr. House Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Jr. House Officer recruitment will primarily involve an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q9. When will the list of selected candidates be displayed?
faq.answer: The list of selected candidates is scheduled to be displayed on 24th July 2026. This date is also the same as the interview date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika. Links to the official notification and application form are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
